content.query:
-----------------------------
-- 2020 CDC mortality data --
-----------------------------
create table dim.mortality_2020_yearly_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
select
  county, county_code, gender_code as gender
  , case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end as race
  , b.age_lvl2 as age_group, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound
  , sum(Deaths) as deaths, sum(Population) as population, sum(Deaths) / sum(Population) as mortality_rate
from dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
on cast(a.age_group_Code as integer) between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
where len(age_group_code) <= 2
group by 
    county, county_code, gender_code, 
    case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
        when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
        when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
        when race = 'White' then 'White'
        else 'Other'
    end, 
    b.age_lvl2, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound
union all
select
  county, county_code, gender_code as gender
  , case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end as race
  , a.age_group_code as age_group, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound
  , sum(Deaths) as deaths, sum(Population) as population, sum(Deaths) / sum(Population) as mortality_rate
from dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
on a.age_group_code = b.age_lvl2
where len(age_group_code) > 2
group by 
    county, county_code, gender_code, 
    case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
        when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
        when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
        when race = 'White' then 'White'
        else 'Other'
    end, a.age_group_code, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound
;

select age_group_Code, sum(deaths)
select count(*) from dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
group by 1
order by 1
;


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc 2022 monthly data, good to be used to create month distribution by county, age, and gender --
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc_mortality_2022_monthly_10yr.csv
delete from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t where true;
insert into dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, month, month_code, deaths)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, Ten_Year_Age_Groups, Ten_Year_Age_Groups_Code, month, month_code, deaths
from development_xdaas.tmp5 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;

-- select a.county_code, a.gender_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, sum(month_ratio)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_distribution_by_month_t a
-- group by 1, 2, 3, 4
-- having abs(sum(month_ratio) - 1 ) > 0.0001

-- select month_code, cast(substring(month_code, 6, 2) as integer) as month, sum(deaths)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t
-- group by 1, 2;

-- select age_group, age_group_code, sum(deaths)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t
-- group by 1, 2
-- order by 1;



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc 2022 yearly data, good for total death numbers by county, age, gender, and race as well as mortality rate (except the 85+ age bucket) --
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc_mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_age_0_to_84.csv
delete from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t where true;
insert into dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, race, race_code, hispanic_origin, hispanic_origin_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths, population, crude_rate)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, Single_Race_6, Single_Race_6_Code, hispanic_origin, hispanic_origin_code, Five_Year_Age_Groups, Five_Year_Age_Groups_Code, deaths, population, crude_rate
from development_xdaas.tmp3 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;

-- cdc_mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_age_85_plus.csv
insert into dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, race, race_code, hispanic_origin, hispanic_origin_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, Single_Race_6, Single_Race_6_Code, hispanic_origin, hispanic_origin_code, Ten_Year_Age_Groups, Ten_Year_Age_Groups_Code, deaths
from development_xdaas.tmp4 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;


create table dim.mortality_2022_distribution_by_month_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with dat as
(
  select 
    county_code, gender_code,
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14', '15-24') then 0 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 25 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14') then 24 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 44 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    cast(substring(month_code, 6, 2) as integer) as month, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths
  from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t
  group by 
    county_code, gender_code,
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14', '15-24') then 0 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 25 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14') then 24 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 44 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end, 
    cast(substring(month_code, 6, 2) as integer)
),
age_gender_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, a.gender_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code, a.gender_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound) as month_ratio
  from
    (
      select 
        county_code, gender_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, count(distinct month) as cnt_month
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, gender_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
      having count(distinct month) > 6
    ) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join dat e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and a.gender_code = e.gender_code and a.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and b.month = e.month
),
age_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound) as month_ratio
  from
    (
      select 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, count(distinct month) as cnt_month
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
      having count(distinct month) > 8
    ) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, month
    ) e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and a.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and b.month = e.month
),
county_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code) as month_ratio
  from
    (select distinct county_code from dat a) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        county_code, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, month
    ) e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and b.month = e.month
),
state_dat as
(
  select 
    a.state_code, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.state_code) as month_ratio
  from
    (select distinct substring(county_code, 1, 2) as state_code from dat a) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        substring(county_code, 1, 2) as state_code, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        substring(county_code, 1, 2), month
    ) e
      on a.state_code = e.state_code and b.month = e.month
)
select
  a.county_code, b.gender_code as gender, d.age_lower_bound, d.age_upper_bound, c.month, coalesce(e.month_ratio, f.month_ratio, g.month_ratio, h.month_ratio) as month_ratio
from 
  (select distinct county_code from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t) a
  cross join (select distinct gender_code from dat) b
  cross join (select distinct month from dat) c
  cross join (select distinct age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound from dat) d
  left join age_gender_dat e
    on a.county_code = e.county_code and b.gender_code = e.gender_code and d.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and d.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and c.month = e.month
  left join age_dat f
    on a.county_code = f.county_code and d.age_lower_bound = f.age_lower_bound and d.age_upper_bound = f.age_upper_bound and c.month = f.month
  left join county_dat g
    on a.county_code = g.county_code and c.month = g.month
  left join state_dat h
    on substring(a.county_code, 1, 2) = h.state_code and c.month = h.month;


create table dim.mortality_2022_monthly_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with numbers as (
    SELECT TOP 200  -- Adjust this number as needed
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 as number
    FROM sys.objects a 
),
dat as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
      when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
      when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
      when race = 'White' then 'White'
      else 'Other'
    end as race,
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    deaths, population
  from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
),
age_dat as
(
  select
    a.county_code, a.gender, a.race, b.number as age, a.deaths / (a.age_upper_bound - a.age_lower_bound + 1) as deaths
  from dat a
  inner join numbers b
   on b.number between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound
)
select 
  a.county_code, a.gender, a.race, b.age_lvl2 as age_group, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, c.month, 
  sum(Deaths * c.month_ratio)  as deaths
from 
  age_dat a
  inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
    on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
  left join dim.mortality_2022_distribution_by_month_t c
    on a.county_code = c.county_code and a.gender = c.gender and b.age_lower_bound >= c.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound <= c.age_upper_bound
group by
  a.county_code, a.gender, a.race, b.age_lvl2, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, c.month
;


-- select sum(deaths)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_t;

-- select *
-- from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_t c
-- where c.month is null;

-- select *
-- from dim.mortality_2022_distribution_by_month_t
-- where county_code = '37093' 


-- select *
-- from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t
-- where substring(county_code, 1, 2) = '72' 



create table dim.mortality_2022_rate_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
select
  county_code, gender_code as gender, 
  case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end as race,
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
  end as age_lower_bound, 
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
  end as age_upper_bound, 
  sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
where 
  age_group_code <> '85+'
group by
  county_code, gender_code, 
  case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end,
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
  end, 
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
  end
union all
select
  county_code, gender_code as gender, 
  case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end as race,
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
  end as age_lower_bound, 
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
  end as age_upper_bound, 
  sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
from dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
where 
  age_group_code = '85+'
group by 
  county_code, gender_code, 
  case when hispanic_origin = 'Hispanic or Latino' then 'Hispanic'
    when race = 'Black or African American' then 'Black'
    when race = 'Asian or Pacific Islander' then 'Asian'
    when race = 'White' then 'White'
    else 'Other'
  end,
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
  end, 
  case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
    when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
  else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
  end
;

select age_group_code, hispanic_origin, count(*)
from dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
group by 1, 2
order by 1, 2
;

-- select sum(deaths)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_rate_t a
-- ;

-- select sum(deaths)
-- from dim.mortality_2022_monthly_10yr_raw_t a
-- ;


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc 2023 monthly data, good to be used to create month distribution by county, age, and gender --
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc_mortality_2023_monthly_10yr.csv
delete from dim.mortality_2023_monthly_10yr_raw_t where true;
insert into dim.mortality_2023_monthly_10yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, month, month_code, deaths)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, month, month_code, deaths
from development_xdaas.tmp8 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc 2023 yearly data, good for total death numbers by county, age, and gender as well as mortality rate (except the 85+ age bucket) --
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- cdc_mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_age_0_to_84.csv
delete from dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t where true;
insert into dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths, population, crude_rate)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths, population, crude_rate
from development_xdaas.tmp6 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;

-- cdc_mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_age_85_plus.csv
insert into dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t
(notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths)
select
  notes, county, county_code, gender, gender_code, age_group, age_group_code, deaths
from development_xdaas.tmp7 a
where a.county_code not in ('abcde')
;


create table dim.mortality_2023_distribution_by_month_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with dat as
(
  select 
    county_code, gender_code, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14', '15-24') then 0 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 25 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14') then 24 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 44 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    cast(substring(month_code, 6, 2) as integer) as month, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths
  from dim.mortality_2023_monthly_10yr_raw_t
  group by 
    county_code, gender_code, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14', '15-24') then 0 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 25 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1', '1-4', '5-14') then 24 
      when age_group_code in ('25-34', '35-44') then 44 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end, 
    cast(substring(month_code, 6, 2) as integer)
),
age_gender_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, a.gender_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code, a.gender_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound) as month_ratio
  from
    (
      select 
        county_code, gender_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, count(distinct month) as cnt_month
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, gender_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
      having count(distinct month) > 6
    ) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join dat e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and a.gender_code = e.gender_code and a.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and b.month = e.month
),
age_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound) as month_ratio
  from
    (
      select 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, count(distinct month) as cnt_month
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
      having count(distinct month) > 8
    ) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, month
    ) e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and a.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and b.month = e.month
),
county_dat as
(
  select 
    a.county_code, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.county_code) as month_ratio
  from
    (select distinct county_code from dat a) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        county_code, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        county_code, month
    ) e
      on a.county_code = e.county_code and b.month = e.month
),
state_dat as
(
  select 
    a.state_code, b.month, coalesce(e.deaths, 0) as deaths,
    coalesce(e.deaths, 0) / sum(coalesce(e.deaths, 0)) over (partition by a.state_code) as month_ratio
  from
    (select distinct substring(county_code, 1, 2) as state_code from dat a) a
    cross join (select distinct month from dat) b
    left join 
    (
      select 
        substring(county_code, 1, 2) as state_code, month, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dat a
      group by 
        substring(county_code, 1, 2), month
    ) e
      on a.state_code = e.state_code and b.month = e.month
)
select
  a.county_code, b.gender_code as gender, d.age_lower_bound, d.age_upper_bound, c.month, coalesce(e.month_ratio, f.month_ratio, g.month_ratio, h.month_ratio) as month_ratio
from 
  (select distinct county_code from dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t) a
  cross join (select distinct gender_code from dat) b
  cross join (select distinct month from dat) c
  cross join (select distinct age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound from dat) d
  left join age_gender_dat e
    on a.county_code = e.county_code and b.gender_code = e.gender_code and d.age_lower_bound = e.age_lower_bound and d.age_upper_bound = e.age_upper_bound and c.month = e.month
  left join age_dat f
    on a.county_code = f.county_code and d.age_lower_bound = f.age_lower_bound and d.age_upper_bound = f.age_upper_bound and c.month = f.month
  left join county_dat g
    on a.county_code = g.county_code and c.month = g.month
  left join state_dat h
    on substring(a.county_code, 1, 2) = h.state_code and c.month = h.month;

-- select a.county_code, a.gender, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, sum(month_ratio)
-- from dim.mortality_2023_distribution_by_month_t a
-- group by 1, 2, 3, 4
-- having abs(sum(month_ratio) - 1 ) > 0.0001
-- ;

create table dim.mortality_2023_monthly_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with numbers as (
    SELECT TOP 200  -- Adjust this number as needed
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 as number
    FROM sys.objects a 
),
dat as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    deaths, population
  from dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
),
age_dat as
(
  select
    a.county_code, a.gender, b.number as age, a.deaths / (a.age_upper_bound - a.age_lower_bound + 1) as deaths
  from dat a
  inner join numbers b
   on b.number between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound
)
select 
  a.county_code, a.gender, b.age_lvl2 as age_group, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, c.month, 
  sum(Deaths * c.month_ratio)  as deaths
from 
  age_dat a
  inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
    on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
  left join dim.mortality_2023_distribution_by_month_t c
    on a.county_code = c.county_code and a.gender = c.gender and b.age_lower_bound >= c.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound <= c.age_upper_bound
group by
  a.county_code, a.gender, b.age_lvl2, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, c.month
;

drop table dim.mortality_2023_rate_t ;
create table dim.mortality_2023_rate_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with rate_2020 as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
  from 
    dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
  where
    len(a.age_group_code) > 2 and a.age_group_code <> '85+'
  group by 
    county_code, gender_code, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end
),
rate_2020_85 as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    85 as age_lower_bound, 
    150 as age_upper_bound, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
  from 
    dim.mortality_2020_yearly_raw_t a
  where
    a.age_group_code = '85+'
  group by 
    county_code, gender_code
),
rate_2022 as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population
  from 
    dim.mortality_2022_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
  where 
    age_group_code <> '85+'
  group by
    county_code, gender_code, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end
),
rate_2023 as
(
  select
    county_code, gender_code as gender, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end as age_lower_bound, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end as age_upper_bound, 
    sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population
  from 
    dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
  where 
    age_group_code <> '85+'
  group by
    county_code, gender_code, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 85 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, 1, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) - 1) as integer)
    end, 
    case when age_group_code in ('1') then 0 
      when age_group_code = '85+' then 150 
    else cast(substring(age_group_code, CHARINDEX('-', age_group_code) + 1, len(age_group_code)) as integer)
    end
)
select
  a.county_code, a.gender, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, 
  case when a.population <> 0 then a.deaths when b.population <> 0 then b.deaths else c.deaths end as deaths,
  case when a.population <> 0 then a.population when b.population <> 0 then b.population else c.population end as population,
  case when a.population <> 0 then a.deaths / a.population when b.population <> 0 then b.deaths / b.population else c.deaths / c.population end as mortality_rate
from 
  rate_2023 a
  left join rate_2022 b
    on a.county_code = b.county_code and a.gender = b.gender and a.age_lower_bound = b.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = b.age_upper_bound
  left join rate_2020 c
    on a.county_code = c.county_code and a.gender = c.gender and a.age_lower_bound = c.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = c.age_upper_bound
union all
select
  county_code, gender, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, deaths, population, mortality_rate
from 
  rate_2020_85 a
;

select age_group_code, hispanic_origin, count(*)
from dim.mortality_2023_yearly_5yr_raw_t a
group by 1, 2
order by 1, 2
;

---------------------------
-- Puerto Rico 2022 data --
--------------------------- 
drop table dim.mortality_pr_2022_by_zip3_t;
create table dim.mortality_pr_2022_by_zip3_t 
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
WITH numbers as (
    SELECT TOP 200  -- Adjust this number as needed
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 as number
    FROM sys.objects a 
),
census_dat as
(
  SELECT 
    a.zip3, a.gender, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, b.age_lvl2 as age_group
    , sum(a.population) as population
  FROM 
    dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_distributed_t a
    inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
      on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
    inner join
    (
      SELECT distinct substring(zip, 1, 3) as zip3 
      FROM dim.zip_county_crosswalk_t a
      where state = 'PR'
    ) c
      on a.zip3 = c.zip3
  group by
    a.zip3, a.gender, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, b.age_lvl2
),
distr_dat as
(
  select 
    c.age_lower_bound as cdc_age_lower_bound, c.age_upper_bound as cdc_age_upper_bound, a.zip3, a.gender, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, a.age_group, 
    population / sum(population) over (partition by c.age_lower_bound, c.age_upper_bound) as population_ratio
  from 
    census_dat a
    left join 
    (
      select distinct age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
      from dim.mortality_pr_2022_weekly_raw_t
    ) c
      on a.age_lower_bound >= c.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound <= c.age_upper_bound
),
month_dat as
(
  select 
    a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, month(dateadd(DAY, b.number, a.week_start_date)) as month, sum(deaths / (datediff(DAY, a.week_start_date, a.week_end_date) + 1)) as deaths
  from 
    dim.mortality_pr_2022_weekly_raw_t a
    inner join numbers b
        on b.number <= datediff(DAY, a.week_start_date, a.week_end_date)
  group by 
    a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, month(dateadd(DAY, b.number, a.week_start_date))
)
select 
  b.zip3, b.age_group, b.age_lower_bound, b.age_upper_bound, b.gender, a.month, a.deaths * b.population_ratio as deaths
from  
  month_dat a
  inner join distr_dat b
    on a.age_lower_bound = b.cdc_age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound = b.cdc_age_upper_bound
;


select sum(deaths) from dim.mortality_pr_2022_by_zip3_t
